title: BPC-157
description: High-purity BPC-157 vials for research on tissue repair and cellular regeneration. Janoshik tested with COA. Free USA shipping.

metadata.storage: Store at ≤6°C, sealed, away from heat, light, and moisture.
metadata.application: Research peptide with potential in angiogenesis and cellular repair research
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule
metadata.synonyms: BPC157, Body Protective Compound 157, Pentadecapeptide BPC-157

title: TB-500
description: TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4 fragment) for research on tissue regeneration and repair mechanisms.

metadata.storage: Short-term: 2-8°C; Long-term: -20°C to -80°C, protect from light and moisture
metadata.application: Research peptide studied in cellular signaling, cytoskeletal dynamics, and peptide fragment structure-function analysis
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: GHK-Cu
description: High-purity GHK-Cu for studies on wound healing and cellular response. 99.82% purity verified.

metadata.storage: Short-term: 2-8°C; Long-term: ≤-20°C, protected from light and moisture
metadata.application: Research peptide evaluated in anti-aging and wound healing studies
metadata.appearance: Blue lyophilized powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: Wolverine
description: BPC-157 and TB-500 blend studied in soft-tissue repair, ECM remodeling, and cell-migration research. Identity and purity confirmed per batch by an independent lab.

metadata.application: Research peptide blend for soft-tissue repair biology, ECM remodeling, cell migration, and angiogenesis

title: CL-1S
description: GLP-1 receptor agonist peptide for metabolic pathway and incretin signaling research. Lyophilized powder in sealed research-grade vial.

metadata.application: Research peptide for GLP-1 receptor agonism and metabolic signaling studies

title: CL-2T
description: Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist peptide for metabolic pathway research. Lyophilized powder in sealed research-grade vial.

metadata.application: Research peptide for dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonism and metabolic signaling studies

title: CL-3R
description: Triple agonist (GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor) peptide for metabolic pathway research. Lyophilized powder in sealed research-grade vial.

metadata.storage: Store at ≤25°C, sealed, away from heat, light, and moisture.
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: Ipamorelin
description: Research peptide evaluated in growth hormone secretion and peptide receptor studies.

metadata.storage: Store at ≤25°C, sealed, away from heat, light, and moisture.
metadata.application: Research peptide evaluated in growth hormone secretion and peptide receptor studies
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: Tesamorelin
description: Tesamorelin (TH9507), a synthetic GHRH analog studied in metabolic regulation and cellular signaling research. Independently assayed; COA published per batch.

metadata.storage: Store at -4°F (-20°C), sealed, away from heat, light, and moisture.
metadata.application: Synthetic analog of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) for metabolic and cellular signaling research
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: MOTS-c
description: Mitochondrial-derived peptide for studies of AMPK-linked pathways, stress-response transcription, and glucose utilization in in-vitro or preclinical systems. Research use only.

metadata.storage: Keep sealed, protected from light and moisture. Lyophilized: ≤ −20 °C for long-term (2–8 °C short-term acceptable).
metadata.application: Research peptide for studies of mitochondrial peptides and metabolic signaling
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: SS-31
description: SS-31 (Elamipretide), a mitochondria-targeted tetrapeptide for studies of mitochondrial function, oxidative stress, and cardiolipin interactions. Research use only.

metadata.application: Mitochondria-targeted research peptide for oxidative stress and cardiolipin interaction studies

title: GLOW
description: GLOW research blend: GHK-Cu (50mg) + TB-500 (10mg) + BPC-157 (10mg). For collagen signaling and tissue remodeling research.

metadata.application: Research peptide blend for studies on ECM remodeling, soft-tissue repair, angiogenesis, and dermal biology
metadata.synonyms: GLOW Peptide Blend, GHK-Cu + TB-500 + BPC-157

title: KLOW
description: KLOW peptide blend: GHK-Cu + TB-500 + BPC-157 + KPV. For collagen signaling and inflammation research.

metadata.application: Research peptide blend for in-vitro and preclinical studies of ECM remodeling, tissue repair, and immune biology
metadata.synonyms: KLOW Peptide Blend, GHK-Cu + TB-500 + BPC-157 + KPV

title: Melanotan 2
description: Melanotan II, a synthetic melanocortin-receptor agonist studied in melanin-stimulation research. Available for research use; COA published per batch.

metadata.storage: Store at ≤25°C, sealed, away from heat, light, and moisture.
metadata.application: Research peptide evaluated in melanocortin receptor and melanin stimulation studies.
metadata.appearance: Solid, white powder in 3mL glass ampule

title: Bac Water
description: Bacteriostatic water (0.9% benzyl alcohol) for reconstitution of lyophilized research compounds. USP-grade, sterile-filtered.

metadata.storage: Store at room temperature (15-30°C). Once opened, use within 28 days.
metadata.application: Sterile diluent for reconstitution of lyophilized peptides and research compounds
metadata.appearance: Clear, colorless liquid in sealed vial
metadata.synonyms: Bacteriostatic Water, Bac Water, Sterile Water with Benzyl Alcohol
